title: 交通发展
subtitle: Transportation Development, Mobility, Infrastructure
assistant_message: Learn to discuss transportation development, mobility solutions, and transportation infrastructure.

examples.chinese: 随着高铁网络的扩展，城市之间的距离大大缩短了。
examples.translation: Along with the expansion of the high-speed rail network, distances between cities have greatly shortened.
examples.translation_id: Seiring dengan perluasan jaringan kereta cepat, jarak antar kota menjadi sangat pendek.

examples.chinese: 智能交通不仅缓解拥堵，而且提高出行体验。
examples.translation: Intelligent transportation not only alleviates congestion but also improves the travel experience.
examples.translation_id: Transportasi cerdas tidak hanya mengurangi kemacetan tetapi juga meningkatkan pengalaman perjalanan.

examples.chinese: 从马车到高铁，交通工具的演变反映了科技进步。
examples.translation: From horse-drawn carriages to high-speed rail, the evolution of transportation reflects technological progress.
examples.translation_id: Dari kereta kuda ke kereta cepat, evolusi transportasi mencerminkan kemajuan teknologi.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Lu Wei
dialogue.chinese: 随着高铁网络的扩展，城市之间的距离大大缩短了。出行更方便了。
dialogue.pinyin: Suízhe gāotiě wǎngluò de kuòzhǎn, chéngshì zhī jiān de jùlí dàdà suōduǎn le. Chūxíng gèng fāngbiàn le.
dialogue.translation: Along with the expansion of the high-speed rail network, distances between cities have greatly shortened. Travel is more convenient.
dialogue.translation_id: Seiring dengan perluasan jaringan kereta cepat, jarak antar kota menjadi sangat pendek. Perjalanan menjadi lebih nyaman.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Ye Wen
dialogue.chinese: 智能交通不仅缓解拥堵，而且提高出行体验。大城市的地铁系统越来越完善。
dialogue.pinyin: Zhìnéng jiāotōng bùjǐn huǎnjiě yōngdǔ, érqiě tígāo chūxíng tǐyàn. Dà chéngshì de dìtiě xìtǒng yuè lái yuè wánshàn.
dialogue.translation: Intelligent transportation not only alleviates congestion but also improves the travel experience. Subway systems in big cities are becoming more complete.
dialogue.translation_id: Transportasi cerdas tidak hanya mengurangi kemacetan tetapi juga meningkatkan pengalaman perjalanan. Sistem kereta bawah tanah di kota-kota besar menjadi lebih lengkap.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Lu Wei
dialogue.chinese: 从马车到高铁，交通工具的演变真令人惊叹。未来还会有哪些创新？
dialogue.pinyin: Cóng mǎchē dào gāotiě, jiāotōng gōngjù de yǎnbiàn zhēn lìng rén jīngtàn. Wèilái hái huì yǒu nǎxiē chuàngxīn?
dialogue.translation: From horse-drawn carriages to high-speed rail, the evolution of transportation is truly amazing. What innovations will there be in the future?
dialogue.translation_id: Dari kereta kuda ke kereta cepat, evolusi transportasi sungguh menakjubkan. Inovasi apa yang akan ada di masa depan?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Ye Wen
dialogue.chinese: 绿色出行和共享出行是趋势。智能交通系统将让城市更高效、更环保。
dialogue.pinyin: Lǜsè chūxíng hé gòngxiǎng chūxíng shì qūshì. Zhìnéng jiāotōng xìtǒng jiāng ràng chéngshì gèng gāoxiào, gèng huánbǎo.
dialogue.translation: Green travel and shared mobility are trends. Intelligent transportation systems will make cities more efficient and environmentally friendly.
dialogue.translation_id: Perjalanan hijau dan mobilitas bersama adalah tren. Sistem transportasi cerdas akan membuat kota lebih efisien dan ramah lingkungan.

exercises.question: How to say 'traffic congestion' in Chinese?
Complete: 智能交通不仅缓解拥堵，______提高出行体验。
